caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a distinctive, tall, grey pointed wig, a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders. He is positioned in a room decorated with framed photographs and posters on the walls. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional microphone on a boom arm. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and similar text "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the right. In the background, a white board and a yellow garment with "LEE" printed on it are visible. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and facial expression shifting as he articulates words. His head tilts slightly and his eyes blink as he continues to address someone off-camera, while the surrounding environment and equipment remain static.
